metrics.gates_first_pass_note: E2E gate failed 2 cycles: CoachMarks localStorage migration broke fixtures, old .solo-banner selector in smoke test

hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Fifth project type (UX/mobile). 3-phase workflow completed. All gates passed after 2 E2E fix cycles.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: E2E gate caught 84 failures (vs 46 baseline) from CoachMarks sessionStorage→localStorage migration. Identified 2 distinct root causes across fixtures.ts, smoke.spec.ts, and invite.spec.ts. Both were FEATURE-class (test updates for redesigned UX, not code bugs).

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: All 5 H7 instructions compliant. Zero console statements in new client code. CoachMarks 100% coverage, MobileNav 100% coverage. Header toggles hidden on mobile via CSS. 3 informational banners gated by walkthrough, 2 urgent banners ungated. Desktop layout unchanged (bottom nav display:none above 768px).
